title: cyphostemma rupicola
intro: Cyphostemma rupicola, also known as the rocky dragon's blood, is a succulent plant species native to the tropical forests of East Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to have numerous health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving wound healing, and boosting the immune system. Cyphostemma rupicola can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, such as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
